nodes.label: AI for unit testing vs wholesale development
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to prefer using for the unit testing instead of a wholesale new development

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: Hallucinations are an occasional source of frustration as well as models ignoring specific instructions

nodes.label: AI as autonomous enrichment system
nodes.grounding_span: We'd ideally like to get the system to the point where we don't have to manually do much with the enrichment flow

nodes.label: Top-down AI mandate vs bottom-up implementation
nodes.grounding_span: my workplace culture is top-down driven, where SVPs decide that we should leverage AI as much as we can

nodes.label: AI as collaborative coding partner with context
nodes.grounding_span: I'm looking forward to continuing to work with Claude Code and similar AI technologies within given repos, so that it can maintain better context

nodes.label: Productivity and resource efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: we likely won't have to worry about resource issues (from a personnel perspective)

nodes.label: Quality and editorial trust
nodes.grounding_span: the occasional output with poor wording or non-standard abbreviations always seem to get the attention of senior editors, who then begin to question the overall worth of the system

nodes.label: User experience enhancement
nodes.grounding_span: further enhance the user experience with our various products

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for unit testing
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to prefer using for the unit testing

nodes.label: Frustration with hallucinations and instruction ignoring
nodes.grounding_span: Hallucinations are an occasional source of frustration as well as models ignoring specific instructions

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI use cases
nodes.grounding_span: I think that we're going to continue finding new use cases

nodes.label: Skepticism toward wholesale code generation
nodes.grounding_span: the wholesale code generations that I have seen usually have enough errors in it that it would have taken about as much time for me to do it myself

nodes.label: Iterative prompt tweaking and model adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: Often it's iterative tweaking of prompts. However, we occasionally do adjust the models

nodes.label: Data-driven quality monitoring with multiple model ratings
nodes.grounding_span: We've also implemented flows were different models will rate the output, and we'll aggregate that data
